name: fact-monorepo
description: Factfulness — frontend/ + backend/. Žiadny koreňový statický server.

scripts.dev: echo 'Frontend: cd frontend && npm run dev  →  :5173' && echo 'Backend:  cd backend && npm run dev   →  :3001'
scripts.start: echo 'Použi: cd backend && npm start  alebo  cd frontend && npm run dev' && exit 1
